breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Bữa trưa có đồ ăn.]] — There is food for lunch.
- [[grammar:Bữa trưa có cơm.]] — There is cooked rice for lunch.
- [[grammar:Bữa trưa có súp.]] — There is soup for lunch.
- [[grammar:Bữa trưa có sữa.]] — There is milk for lunch.
- [[grammar:Bữa trưa có chuối.]] — There are bananas for lunch.
- [[grammar:Bữa trưa có xoài.]] — There are mangoes for lunch.
- [[grammar:Gia Bảo muốn cơm.]] — Gia Bảo wants rice.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà muốn súp.]] — Thu Hà wants soup.
- [[grammar:Gia Bảo muốn sữa.]] — Gia Bảo wants milk.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà muốn trà.]] — Thu Hà wants tea.
- [[grammar:Gia Bảo muốn nước.]] — Gia Bảo wants water.
- [[grammar:Gia Bảo muốn cam.]] — Gia Bảo wants an orange.
- [[grammar:Thu Hà muốn dưa hấu.]] — Thu Hà wants watermelon.
